prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.9 kg; Height 157.6 cm; BMI 24.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 9.8%; 6 months ago 10.3%; 3 months ago 10.8%; current 10.2%), FPG (12 months ago 254mg/dL; 9 months ago 279mg/dL; 6 months ago 256mg/dL; 3 months ago 258mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.2kg; 9 months ago 61.9kg; 6 months ago 59.7kg; 3 months ago 59.3kg; current 60.9kg), Height (12 months ago 157.6cm; 9 months ago 157.6cm; 6 months ago 157.6cm; 3 months ago 157.6cm; current 157.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 60U/L; 9 months ago 66U/L; 6 months ago 59U/L; 3 months ago 60U/L; current 65U/L), AST (12 months ago 95U/L; 9 months ago 104U/L; 6 months ago 98U/L; 3 months ago 104U/L; current 103U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.9mg/dL; current 1.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 79mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 81mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 82mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; current 79mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 52mg/g; 9 months ago 71mg/g; 6 months ago 72mg/g; 3 months ago 71mg/g; current 63mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 101mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 123mg/dL; 9 months ago 108mg/dL; 6 months ago 108mg/dL; 3 months ago 102mg/dL; current 114mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.3g/dL; 9 months ago 12.7g/dL; 6 months ago 13.3g/dL; 3 months ago 13.3g/dL; current 13.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
